name: ruby-websocket
title: ruby-websocket
summary: Universal Ruby library to handle WebSocket protocol
description:
Universal Ruby library to handle WebSocket protocol
This library focuses on providing abstraction layer over
WebSocket API instead of providing server or client
functionality.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-websocket because Universal Ruby library to handle WebSocket protocol.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-websocket with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-websocket --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
